53 = Community Mental Health Ctr. A facility that provides the following services: outpatient 
services, including specialized outpatient services for children, the elderly, individuals who are 
chronically ill, and residents of the CMHC's mental health services area who have been 
discharged from inpatient treatment at a mental health facility; 24 hour a day emergency care 
services; day treatment,
